title: 理事長代理の評価アップ

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: She's grown a lot, hasn't she?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Her stamina has vastly improved since the last
time I watched one of your sessions.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You've been training her more effectively than I
gave you credit for.
